ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: tomato sauce (58%) [tomatoes (37%), water, sugar, maize thickener (1422), maize flour, salt, stabilisers (412, 466), flavours, spice, food acid (citric acid)], navy beans (42%) (contain traces of soy)
